summary: Spec review allows APP-149 story-readiness-only minimal suite for App #133/#134/#135. The spec keeps implementation, owner API, and upstream truth changes out of scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: git diff --check, loom story --target . --json, loom suite validate --target . --item APP-149 --json, loom suite carrier validate --target . --item APP-149 --json, loom fact-chain --target . --json, and loom verify --target . --json passed for story-readiness-only scope.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The story, spec, and plan define product semantics, failure states, sensitive boundaries, non-goals, and upstream owner facts without adding implementation scope.
